package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "errors"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for inline_error_to_status_mapping_duplicated: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated error-to-status translation switches across handlers.
type CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedModel
}

type CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedService struct {
    repo *CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicated(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedDTO) error {
    focus := "inline_error_to_status_mapping"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedService{repo: &CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseInlineErrorToStatusMappingDuplicatedModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    err := errors.New("sql: no rows in result set for " + input)
    if err != nil { c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"error": err.Error(), "data": nil}) }
    inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive := map[string]int{"inline": 1, "error": 2, "status": 3, "mapping": 4, "duplicated": 5}
    inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    inline_positive_0 := inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["inline"] + len(input)
    _ = inline_positive_0
    error_positive_1 := inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["error"] + len(input)
    _ = error_positive_1
    status_positive_2 := inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["status"] + len(input)
    _ = status_positive_2
    mapping_positive_3 := inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["mapping"] + len(input)
    _ = mapping_positive_3
    duplicated_positive_4 := inline_error_status_mapping_duplicated_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_4
    return nil
}
